title: Ransomware-Angriff auf Produktionssysteme
description: Verschlüsselung geschäftskritischer Daten durch Ransomware-Angriff. Betrifft ERP-System, Produktionssteuerung und Backup-Infrastruktur. Erpressung mit Bitcoin-Forderung.
threat: Ransomware / Verschlüsselungstrojaner
vulnerability: Fehlende Netzwerksegmentierung, unzureichende Offline-Backups

title: Unbefugter Zugriff auf Kundendaten
description: Sicherheitslücke in einer Web-Applikation ermöglicht unbefugten Dritten den Zugriff auf personenbezogene Kundendaten (Datenpanne nach Art. 33 DSGVO).
threat: Datenpanne, Reputationsverlust, Bußgeld
vulnerability: Fehlende WAF, ungepatchte Web-Applikation

title: Phishing-Angriff auf Mitarbeiter (CEO-Fraud)
description: Gezielter Spear-Phishing-Angriff auf Führungskräfte und Finanzabteilung zur Initiierung betrügerischer Überweisungen oder Diebstahl von Zugangsdaten.
threat: Social Engineering, Business Email Compromise (BEC)
vulnerability: Fehlende Mehr-Faktor-Authentisierung, unzureichende Schulung

title: Datenverlust durch Hardware-Ausfall ohne geprüfte Backups
description: Backups werden erstellt, aber nicht regelmäßig auf Wiederherstellbarkeit geprüft. Im Notfall könnten Backups beschädigt oder unvollständig sein.
threat: Datenverlust, Betriebsunterbrechung
vulnerability: Kein Backup-Restore-Testprozess, fehlende Monitoring-Alertierung

title: Compliance-Verstoß DSGVO – fehlende Dokumentation
description: Fehlende oder unvollständige Verzeichnisse der Verarbeitungstätigkeiten (Art. 30 DSGVO) und technisch-organisatorischer Maßnahmen (Art. 32 DSGVO) führen zu Bußgeldrisiken.
threat: Bußgeld bis 20 Mio. EUR oder 4% des Jahresumsatzes
vulnerability: Unvollständiges VVT, fehlende TOM-Dokumentation

title: Insiderbedrohung durch privilegierte Benutzer
description: Administratoren oder Entwickler mit übermäßigen Zugriffsrechten könnten absichtlich oder fahrlässig Daten exfiltrieren oder Systeme manipulieren.
threat: Insiderangriff, Datenleck, Sabotage
vulnerability: Fehlende Least-Privilege-Durchsetzung, unzureichendes Privileged Access Management (PAM)

title: Verstoß gegen NIS2-Meldepflicht
description: Ein Sicherheitsvorfall wird nicht innerhalb der geforderten 24-Stunden-Frühwarnung an das BSI gemeldet, was zu erheblichen Bußgeldern führt.
threat: Regulatorische Sanktion, Bußgeld bis 10 Mio. EUR oder 2% des Jahresumsatzes
vulnerability: Kein dokumentierter NIS2-Meldeprozess, unklare Zuständigkeiten

title: Lieferkettenangriff auf kritische Software
description: Ein kritischer Software-Lieferant wird kompromittiert und verteilt Schadsoftware über legitime Update-Kanäle (SolarWinds-Szenario).
threat: Supply-Chain-Angriff, vertrauenswürdige Schadsoftware
vulnerability: Fehlende Lieferanten-Sicherheitsbewertung, kein Integritätscheck von Updates

title: [SCAN] Microsoft Windows HID Functionality (Over USB) Code Execution Vulnerability (Jan 2011) (4 Hosts betroffen)
description:
File checked for existence: C:\Windows\system32\hidserv.dll


**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.32, 172.16.123.31, 172.16.123.21, 172.16.123.1

**CVEs:** CVE-2011-0638

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: Microsoft Windows HID Functionality (Over USB) Code Execution Vulnerability (Jan 2011)
vulnerability: File checked for existence: C:\Windows\system32\hidserv.dll
mitigationNotes:
[Workaround] No solution or patch was made available for at least one year
  since disclosure of this vulnerability. Likely none will be provided anymore. General solution
  options are to upgrade to a newer release, disable respective features, remove the product or
  replace the product by another one.

  A workaround is to introduce device filtering on the target host to only allow trusted USB devices
  to be enabled automatically. Once this workaround is in place an overwrite for this vulnerability
  can be created to mark it as a false positive.

description:

TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC2_CBC_40_MD5
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC4_40_MD5
TLS_RSA_WITH_RC4_128_MD5
TLS_RSA_WITH_RC4_128_SHA




**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.242, 172.16.123.230, 172.16.123.240, 172.16.123.231, 172.16.123.241

**CVEs:** CVE-2013-2566, CVE-2015-2808, CVE-2015-4000

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: SSL/TLS: Report Weak Cipher Suites
vulnerability:
'Weak' cipher suites accepted by this service via the TLSv1.2 protocol:

TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC2_CBC_40_MD5
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC4_40_MD5
TLS_RSA_WITH_RC4_128_MD5
TLS_RSA_WITH_RC4_128_SHA
mitigationNotes:
[Mitigation] The configuration of this services should be changed so that it
  does not accept the listed weak cipher suites anymore.

  Please see the references for more resources supporting you with this task.

title: [SCAN] Weak Key Exchange (KEX) Algorithm(s) Supported (SSH) (5 Hosts betroffen)
description:
The remote SSH server supports the following weak KEX algorithm(s):

KEX algorithm                      | Reason
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha1 | Using SHA-1
diffie-hellman-group1-sha1         | Using Oakley Group 2 (a 1024-bit MODP group) and SHA-1


**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.240, 172.16.123.241, 172.16.123.242, 172.16.123.230, 172.16.123.231

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: Weak Key Exchange (KEX) Algorithm(s) Supported (SSH)
vulnerability:
The remote SSH server supports the following weak KEX algorithm(s):

KEX algorithm                      | Reason
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha1 | Using SHA-1
diffie-hellman-group1-sha1         | Using Oakley Group 2 (a 1024-bit MODP group) and SHA-1
mitigationNotes:
[Mitigation] Disable the reported weak KEX algorithm(s)

  - 1024-bit MODP group / prime KEX algorithms:

  Alternatively use elliptic-curve Diffie-Hellmann in general, e.g. Curve 25519.

title: [SCAN] SSL/TLS: Renegotiation DoS Vulnerability (CVE-2011-1473, CVE-2011-5094) (5 Hosts betroffen)
description:
The following indicates that the remote SSL/TLS service is affected:

Protocol Version | Successful re-done SSL/TLS handshakes (Renegotiation) over an existing / already established SSL/TLS connection
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TLSv1.2          | 10


**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.231, 172.16.123.240, 172.16.123.242, 172.16.123.230, 172.16.123.241

**CVEs:** CVE-2011-1473, CVE-2011-5094

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: SSL/TLS: Renegotiation DoS Vulnerability (CVE-2011-1473, CVE-2011-5094)
vulnerability:
The following indicates that the remote SSL/TLS service is affected:

Protocol Version | Successful re-done SSL/TLS handshakes (Renegotiation) over an existing / already established SSL/TLS connection
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TLSv1.2          | 10
mitigationNotes:
[VendorFix] Users should contact their vendors for specific patch
  information.

  A general solution is to remove/disable renegotiation capabilities altogether from/in the affected
  SSL/TLS service.

title: [SCAN] SNMP GETBULK Reflected DRDoS (2 Hosts betroffen)
description:
By sending an SNMP GetBulk request of 41 bytes, we received a response of 1386 bytes.


**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.240, 172.16.123.230

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: SNMP GETBULK Reflected DRDoS
vulnerability: By sending an SNMP GetBulk request of 41 bytes, we received a response of 1386 bytes.
mitigationNotes:
[Workaround] Disable the SNMP service on the remote host if you do not use it or
  restrict access to this service.

title: [SCAN] DNS Cache Snooping Vulnerability (UDP) - Active Check
description:
Received (an) answer(s) for a non-recursive query for "example.com".

Result:

104.18.26.120


**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.1

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: DNS Cache Snooping Vulnerability (UDP) - Active Check
vulnerability:
Received (an) answer(s) for a non-recursive query for "example.com".

Result:

104.18.26.120
mitigationNotes:
[Mitigation] There are multiple possible mitigation steps depending on
  location and functionality needed by the DNS server:

  - Disable recursion

  - Don't allow public access to DNS Servers doing recursion

  - Leave recursion enabled if the DNS Server stays on a corporate network that cannot be reached
  by untrusted clients

  - If the risk is accepted either create an override for this result or configure the 'Private LAN'
  setting mentioned earlier

title: [SCAN] SSL/TLS: Deprecated TLSv1.0 and TLSv1.1 Protocol Detection (4 Hosts betroffen)
description:
In addition to TLSv1.2+ the service is also providing the deprecated TLSv1.0 and TLSv1.1 protocols and supports one or more ciphers. Those supported ciphers can be found in the 'SSL/TLS: Report Supported Cipher Suites' (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.25623.1.0.802067) VT.


**Betroffene Hosts:** 172.16.123.1, 172.16.123.32, 172.16.123.21, 172.16.123.31

**CVEs:** CVE-2011-3389, CVE-2015-0204, CVE-2023-41928, CVE-2024-41270, CVE-2025-3200

**Scan-Datum:** 2026-03-12
**Scan-Referenz:** testing
threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: SSL/TLS: Deprecated TLSv1.0 and TLSv1.1 Protocol Detection
vulnerability: In addition to TLSv1.2+ the service is also providing the deprecated TLSv1.0 and TLSv1.1 protocols and supports one or more ciphers. Those supported ciphers can be found in the 'SSL/TLS: Report Supported Cipher Suites' (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.25623.1.0.802067) VT.
mitigationNotes:
[Mitigation] It is recommended to disable the deprecated TLSv1.0 and/or
  TLSv1.1 protocols in favor of the TLSv1.2+ protocols.

  Please see the references for more resources supporting you with this task.

description:

TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC2_CBC_40_MD5
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC4_40_MD5

threat: Schwachstelle erkannt durch Greenbone-Scan: SSL/TLS: RSA Temporary Key Handling 'RSA_EXPORT' Downgrade Issue (FREAK)
vulnerability:
'RSA_EXPORT' cipher suites accepted by this service via the TLSv1.2 protocol:

TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC2_CBC_40_MD5
TLS_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_RC4_40_MD5
mitigationNotes:
[VendorFix] - Remove support for 'RSA_EXPORT' cipher suites from the
  service. Please see the references for more resources supporting you with this task.

  - If the service is using OpenSSL: Update to version 0.9.8zd, 1.0.0p, 1.0.1k or later.
